title: Crafted Chaos
description:
Crafted Chaos is a modpack built for friends who want to explore, build, and cause a little mayhem together. With a mix of magic, tech, and adventure, every session turns into a wild, unforgettable ride.

Want it sillier, more epic, or more descriptive?
body:
Jump into a world where anything can happen — and probably will. Crafted Chaos is a modpack built for friends, fun, and absolute mayhem. Packed with a wild mix of magic, machines, monsters, and more, every session brings something new. Whether you're building giant factories, casting spells, or just causing chaos with your crew, there's something for everyone.

Key Features:
- Tons of mods across tech, magic, adventure, and QoL
- Balanced for multiplayer — from chill base-building to all-out boss fights
- Built-in tools for collaboration (and maybe some mischief 👀)
- No rules, just vibes — craft your own chaos

Grab your friends, load the pack, and let the madness begin.
